shellCommands.command:
cd /home/user/workspace && printf '%s
' 'niceeval-tool-call-ok' > TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt && cat TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt && npm run build
cd /home/user/workspace && ls -la && cat package.json 2>/dev/null || true && ls -la TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt && cat TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt

cd /home/user/workspace && git status --short && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt')
print(repr(p.read_text()))
PY
